win_condition: First player to reach 20 VP at end-of-year checks wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with most residual income wins; if still tied, tied player with most lira wins.

categories.label: Victory Point Track
categories.description: Total VP earned during play from wine orders, structures, visitors, and bonuses.

categories.label: Endgame/Bonus VP
categories.description: Any VP awarded by card effects resolved at game end (if used in expansion/variant).
